from where he have completed computer engineering
Avishek Basyal completed his Bachelor of Computer Engineering at the Institute of Engineering (IOE), Paschimanchal Campus, Pokhara, Nepal.

Avishek Basyal has worked on several projects:

1. Automated AI Traffic Monitoring System (Final Year Project) - Tech Stack: FastAPI, Next.js, SQLite, YOLO, PyTorch
2. FastAPI Photo & Video Sharing API (Learning Project)
3. Agentic AI System (Learning Project) - Tech Stack: Python, LangChain, LangGraph, LLMs

what is this whole pdf about

This PDF appears to be a collection of learning resources for someone interested in Math and Statistics for AI, covering topics such as:

- Basic statistics concepts (descriptive vs inferential, continuous vs discrete data)
- Linear Algebra (vectors, matrices, eigenvalues, eigenvectors)
- Calculus (integral and differential calculus basics)
- Probability
- Distributions (Normal distribution)
- Correlation and covariance
